rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annex blocks
generic_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Use only identifiers that are visible in the current scope when writing AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
